title: Le Danger au Temps de la Vieillesse
description: Une predication basee sur le Psaume 71:9, appelant a s'attacher a Dieu meme dans la vieillesse.

title: UBUBATA
description: Ubutumwa busobanura ububata bw'ibyaha n'uburyo Kristo atanga umudendezo nyakuri ku bamwizera.

title: Bondage
description: A message exposing bondage to sin and the true freedom found in Christ.

title: La Servitude
description: Un message sur la servitude du peche et la vraie liberte en Jesus-Christ.

title: The Great Controversy
description:
This is the second edition of “The Great Controversy Between Christ and Satan”, revised and corrected from the first edition. It faithfully follows the original English publication.

The book presents the great conflict between good and evil from the destruction of Jerusalem through the Reformation and into the final events of earth’s history. It strengthens faith and prepares believers for Christ’s return.

title: La Tragédie des Siècles
description:
Deuxième édition révisée et corrigée du livre « La Tragédie des Siècles », fidèle à l’original anglais.

Ce livre décrit le grand conflit entre le bien et le mal à travers l’histoire, depuis la destruction de Jérusalem jusqu’aux événements de la fin des temps, préparant les croyants au retour du Christ.

title: INTAMBARA IKOMEYE
description:
Iyi ni ngeri ya kabiri y’igitabo “Intambara Ikomeye Hagati ya Kristo na Satani”. Muri iyi ngeri, ibidatunganye byagaragaye mu ya mbere byarakosowe, kandi igitabo cyateguwe hakurikijwe umwimerere w’icyongereza “The Great Controversy Between Christ and Satan”.

Iki gitabo gisobanura intambara iri hagati y’icyiza n’ikibi kuva mu mateka ya kera, gusenyuka kwa Yerusalemu, kugeza ku bihe bya nyuma no kugaruka kwa Kristo. Gitera kwizera, kigakomeza umutima w’abizera kandi kikabategurira ibihe bya nyuma.

title: Prophets and Kings
description:
Prophets and Kings” is the second volume in the five-book series explaining sacred history. Though written later, it presents a powerful overview of the lives of Israel’s prophets and kings.

Through decades of ministry, Ellen G. White revealed that behind human history stand unseen forces — the hand of God working in righteousness and the opposing power of the enemy. This book connects biblical history with the ongoing spiritual conflict between good and evil.

title: Prophètes et Rois
description:
Prophètes et Rois » est le deuxième volume de la série expliquant l’histoire sacrée. Ce livre met en lumière la vie des prophètes et des rois d’Israël.

Ellen G. White montre que derrière les événements humains agissent des forces invisibles : la main de Dieu et l’œuvre de l’ennemi. L’ouvrage relie l’histoire biblique au conflit spirituel entre le bien et le mal.

title: ABAHANUZI N’ABAMI
description:
Abahanuzi n’Abami” ni igitabo cya kabiri mu bitabo bitanu by’ingenzi bisobanura amateka yera. Nubwo ari cyo cyanditswe bwa nyuma muri uru ruhererekane, gifite agaciro gakomeye mu gusobanura amateka y’abahanuzi n’abami ba Isirayeli.

Mu myaka irenga 70 Ellen G. White yamaze yigisha no kwandika, yagiye agaragaza ubusobanuro bwimbitse bw’ibyabaye mu mateka y’abantu, agaragaza ko inyuma y’ibibera mu bantu habamo imbaraga zitagaragara: ukuboko kw’Imana gukorera mu gukiranuka n’imbaraga z’umwanzi zishaka kurimbura.

Iki gitabo gifasha umusomyi gusobanukirwa isano iri hagati y’amateka y’abantu n’intambara y’umwuka ikomeje hagati y’icyiza n’ikibi.

title: IGICE CYA 2 ingoro no kwegurirwa imana kwayo
IGICE CYA 2 ingoro no kwegurirwa imana kwayo

The Acts of the Apostles
description:
The Acts of the Apostles” is the fourth volume in the sacred history series. It tells the inspiring story of the early Christian believers after Christ’s victory over Satan and His ascension to heaven.

The book describes intense persecution, unwavering faith, and the missionary journeys of Peter, Paul, John, James, Luke, Barnabas, Stephen, Mark, and other early disciples who carried the gospel throughout the known world.

Though many sacrificed their lives for their faith, the story continues today as Christ’s church advances under the same divine promises and spiritual power.

title: Les Actes des Apôtres
description:
Les Actes des Apôtres » est le quatrième volume de la série d’histoire sacrée. Il raconte l’histoire inspirante de l’Église chrétienne primitive après l’ascension du Christ.

Le livre décrit les persécutions sévères, la fidélité des croyants et l’expansion de l’Évangile par Pierre, Paul, Jean, Jacques et les autres disciples.

Malgré les sacrifices, l’œuvre continue aujourd’hui, guidée par les mêmes promesses et la puissance de Dieu.

title: IBYAKOZWE N’INTUMWA
description:
Ibyakozwe n’Intumwa” ni igitabo cya kane mu ruhererekane rw’ibitabo bisobanura amateka yera. Gisobanura inkuru itangaje y’itorero rya mbere nyuma y’uko Yesu amaze gutsinda Satani agasubira mu ijuru.

Iki gitabo kigaragaza uburyo umwanzi yahanganye n’itorero rya Kristo ku isi, binyuze mu gutotezwa gukomeye no kugerageza kwizera kw’abakristo ba mbere. Petero, Pawulo, Yakobo, Yohana, Luka, Barinaba, Sitefano, Mariko n’izindi ntumwa zatwaye ubutumwa bwiza ku isi yose yari izwi icyo gihe.

Nubwo benshi batanze ubuzima bwabo kubera kwizera kwabo, ubutumwa bwiza bwakomeje gukwira hose. Inkuru iracyakomeza no muri iki gihe, kuko itorero rya Kristo rikomeje umurimo umwe kandi rifite amasezerano amwe yo kuyoborwa n’imbaraga z’Imana.

title: IGICE CYA 1 UMUGAMBI IMANA IFITIYE ITORERO RYAYO
IGICE CYA 1 UMUGAMBI IMANA IFITIYE ITORERO RYAYO
IGICE CYA 1 UMUGAMBI IMANA IFITIYE ITORERO RYAYO
The One Desired in All Ages
description:
In every human heart, regardless of background or social status, there is a deep longing for something greater than what is currently possessed.

This desire was placed in humanity by a merciful God so that people would not be satisfied with temporary achievements. God invites every person to seek what is eternal — truth, salvation, and everlasting life.

title: Celui qui est Désiré en Tout Temps
description:
Dans le cœur de chaque être humain se trouve un profond désir de quelque chose de plus grand. Ce désir a été placé par un Dieu miséricordieux afin que l’homme ne se contente pas de ce qu’il possède temporairement.

Ce message invite chacun à rechercher ce qui est éternel et à recevoir la bénédiction de la vie éternelle.

title: UWIFUZWA IBIHE BYOSE
description:
Uwifuzwa Ibihe Byose” ni ubutumwa bushingiye ku kuri ko mu mitima y’abantu bose, hatitawe ku bwoko cyangwa urwego rw’imibereho, habamo icyifuzo gikomeye cyo kubona icyo badafite.

Iki cyifuzo cyashyizwe mu muntu n’Imana y’inyambabazi, kugira ngo atanyurwa n’ubuzima bwe bwa none cyangwa ngo yishimire ibyo agezeho gusa. Imana yifuza ko umuntu ashakisha icy’ingenzi kirenze ibindi byose — ukuri, agakiza n’ubugingo buhoraho.

Ubu butumwa burahamagarira buri wese gushaka iby’iteka, no kwakira umugisha w’ubugingo bw’ibihe bidashira.

title: IGICE CYA 1 IMANA IRI KUMWE NATWE

title: Messages to Young People
description:
Messages to Young People” is a collection of letters written by Ellen G. White to her children before the death of her eldest son, Henry, at the age of sixteen.

These letters reflect heartfelt parental counsel grounded in biblical principles, aimed at building strong character and spiritual commitment in youth.

The volume also includes material from the original compilation, including Uriah Smith’s address at Henry White’s funeral and selected writings from other contributors.

title: Prophètes et Rois
description:
Messages à la Jeunesse » est un recueil de lettres écrites par Ellen G. White à ses enfants avant le décès de son fils aîné, Henry, à l’âge de seize ans.

Ces lettres contiennent des conseils spirituels et pratiques basés sur les principes bibliques, destinés à fortifier le caractère et la foi des jeunes.

L’ouvrage comprend également des extraits de la compilation originale, y compris l’adresse de Uriah Smith lors des funérailles de Henry White.

title: UBUTUMWA KU BASORE
description:
UBUTUMWA KU BASORE
ubutumwa ku basore ni icyegeranyo cy’amabaruwa Ellen White yandikiye abana be, mbere y’urupfu rw’umuhungu we w’imfura, Henry, afite imyaka 16. Aya mabaruwa ni agace kavuye mu gitabo cyuzuye, cyarimo mbere na Uriah Smith. aderesi mu muhango wo gushyingura Henry White, kimwe n’inyandiko y’abandi banditsi

title: Patriarchs and Prophets
description:
Patriarchs and Prophets is the first volume in the sacred history series. It covers biblical history from the creation of the world to the reign of King David.

While presenting ancient events, the book reveals deeper spiritual meanings, explaining the motives behind human actions and highlighting the great conflict between good and evil.

It demonstrates that biblical history is not merely narrative but a powerful source of instruction capable of transforming lives and producing lasting change.

title: Patriarches et Prophètes
description:
Patriarches et Prophètes » est le premier volume de la série d’histoire sacrée. Il retrace l’histoire biblique depuis la création du monde jusqu’au règne du roi David.

L’ouvrage révèle les significations spirituelles profondes des événements anciens et met en lumière le grand conflit entre le bien et le mal.

Il montre que l’histoire biblique possède un pouvoir transformateur pour la vie des croyants.

title: ABAKURAMBERE N’ABAHANUZI
description:
Abakurambere n’Abahanuzi” ni igitabo cya mbere mu ruhererekane rw’ibitabo bisobanura amateka yera. Gifite insanganyamatsiko ku mateka akubiye mu Byanditswe Byera, kuva mu kuremwa kw’isi kugeza ku ngoma ya Dawidi.

Nubwo kivuga ku mateka ya kera, gitanga ubusobanuro bushya kandi bwimbitse, gihishura impamvu z’ibikorwa by’abantu n’ingaruka zabyo. Kigaragaza ibikorwa by’ingenzi mu mateka ya Bibiliya kandi kikazana umucyo ku ntambara iri hagati y’icyiza n’ikibi.

Iki gitabo gifasha umusomyi kubona ko amateka ya Bibiliya atari inkuru gusa, ahubwo ari isoko y’inyigisho zifite imbaraga zo guhindura ubuzima no kuzana impinduka zirambye.

title: Counsels on Diet and Foods
description:
Counsels on Diet and Foods” presents practical guidance on nutrition and its impact on physical, mental, and spiritual health.

Ellen G. White emphasized the importance of wholesome diet and balanced living long before modern scientific research confirmed its value. This book provides timeless principles for healthy Christian living.

title: Conseils sur la Nutrition et les Aliments
description:
Conseils sur la Nutrition et les Aliments » présente des conseils pratiques sur la relation entre l’alimentation et la santé physique et spirituelle.

Ellen G. White soulignait l’importance d’une alimentation saine bien avant les recherches scientifiques modernes.

title: INAMA KU MIRIRE N’IBYOKURYA
description: Iki gitabo gitanga ubuyobozi ku buzima bwiza binyuze mu mirire iboneye, gishingiye ku nyigisho za Ellen G. White.

title: Testimonies for the Church – Volume 1
description:
Testimonies for the Church – Volume 1  contains spiritual counsel given to guide God’s church in preparation for the return of Christ.

Seventh-day Adventists eagerly await the second coming of Jesus, when sin, suffering, sickness, and death will be no more.

This volume is drawn from Ellen G. White’s earliest published works, including Christian Experience and Views (1851), Supplement to Christian Experience and Views (1854), and Spiritual Gifts, Volume 1 (1858).

It provides foundational instruction for Christian character development and spiritual readiness.

title: Témoignages pour l’Église – Volume 1
description:
Témoignages pour l’Église – Volume 1  rassemble des conseils spirituels destinés à préparer l’Église au retour du Christ.

Les Adventistes du Septième Jour attendent avec espérance la seconde venue de Jésus, lorsque le péché, la souffrance et la mort disparaîtront.

Cet ouvrage est issu des premiers écrits publiés par Ellen G. White, notamment Christian Experience and Views (1851), Supplement (1854) et Spiritual Gifts, Volume 1 (1858).

Il offre des orientations essentielles pour la croissance spirituelle et la préparation au retour du Seigneur.

title: INAMA ZIGIRWA ITORERO – IGITABO CYA 1
description:
Inama Zigirwa Itorero – Igitabo cya 1  ni igitabo gikubiyemo inama z’umwuka zigenewe itorero ry’Imana mu gihe cyo kwitegura gusanganira Kristo.

Abadiventisti b’Umunsi wa Karindwi bategereje n’icyizere kinini kugaruka kwa Yesu Kristo, aho nta cyaha, nta mibabaro, nta ndwara cyangwa urupfu bizongera kubaho.

Iki gitabo gikomoka ku nyandiko za mbere za Ellen G. White, zirimo “Imibereho ya Gikristo n’Ibitekerezo bya Ellen G. White” (1851), “Inyongera ku Mibereho n’Ibitekerezo” (1854), ndetse na “Impano za Mwuka”, umuzingo wa 1 (1858).

Gitanga ubuyobozi bwimbitse ku buzima bwa gikristo no ku kwitegura kugaruka kwa Kristo.

title: Trusting God in Times of Trial
excerpt: Daily devotional reflection from Beacon of God Ministries.
body:
KEY SCRIPTURE: Yakobo 1:2-4

TODAY'S REFLECTION
Trusting God in Times of Trial calls us to keep our eyes on God more than on pressure around us. Scripture does not only comfort us; it forms our character and direction for daily life.

title: Kwiringira Imana mu gihe cy ibigeragezo
excerpt: Iyo ibihe bikomeye byegeranye, ijambo ry Imana ridukomeza kandi riduha amahoro adashingiye ku bihe.
body:
UMURONGO NYAMUTIMA: Yakobo 1:2-4

INSHINGA Y UYU MUNSI
Kwiringira Imana mu gihe cy ibigeragezo ni ubutumwa buduhamagarira kureba ku Mana kuruta uko tureba ku bibazo. Ijambo ry Imana riduha icyerekezo, rikadukomeza kandi rikadutoza kuguma mu kuri no mu kwizera. Ibi si amagambo gusa yo kuduhumuriza, ahubwo ni umurongo wo kubaho buri munsi.

ICYO DUSOBANUKIRWA N IRIJAMBO
Iyo twiga Ijambo ry Imana twitonze, tubona ko Imana ikunda kutuyobora buhoro buhoro, ikadukura mu bwoba ikatugeza ku mahoro. Nubwo ibihe biba bikomeye, Imana ikomeza kuba indahemuka. Ntabwo idusaba gusobanukirwa byose mbere; idusaba kuyizera no kuyumvira. Iyo tubikoze, umutima uraruhuka kandi ubuzima bugenda bugira umusaruro.

GUSHYIRA MU BIKORWA UYU MUNSI
1) Tangira umunsi wawe usenga byibura iminota 10, uvuga ku murongo wa Yakobo 1:2-4.
2) Andika ibintu bitatu ushimira Imana uyu munsi, nubwo byaba bito.
3) Fata icyemezo kimwe gifatika cyo kubaho mu kuri: kubabarira, kuvugisha ukuri, cyangwa gufasha undi muntu.
4) Nimugoroba, subiza amaso inyuma urebe aho Imana yakuyoboye.

ISENGESHO RISOZA
Mwami Mana, urakoze kuko Ijambo ryawe rinyubaka kandi rikankomeza. Nyigisha kugendera mu kuri kwawe no kuguma mu kwizera nubwo ibihe bitoroshye. Mpa umutima wumva, umenya kubabarira, no gukunda abantu nk uko wabikunze. Umwuka Wera ampindure buri munsi, kugira ngo ubuzima bwanjye bugaragaze Kristo. Mu izina rya Yesu, Amen.

INTAMBWE Y UMWUKA
Urahamagariwe gusoma iri jambo inshuro ebyiri uyu munsi no kurisangiza undi muntu umwe. Ibyo ukoze uyu munsi birashobora gutangira impinduka ndende mu buzima bwawe no mu buzima bw abandi.

title: Kuba umunyu n umucyo
excerpt: Abakristo bahamagarirwa kugira ingaruka nziza mu muryango no mu gihugu.
body:
UMURONGO NYAMUTIMA: Matayo 5:13-16

INSHINGA Y UYU MUNSI
Kuba umunyu n umucyo ni ubutumwa buduhamagarira kureba ku Mana kuruta uko tureba ku bibazo. Ijambo ry Imana riduha icyerekezo, rikadukomeza kandi rikadutoza kuguma mu kuri no mu kwizera. Ibi si amagambo gusa yo kuduhumuriza, ahubwo ni umurongo wo kubaho buri munsi.

ICYO DUSOBANUKIRWA N IRIJAMBO
Iyo twiga Ijambo ry Imana twitonze, tubona ko Imana ikunda kutuyobora buhoro buhoro, ikadukura mu bwoba ikatugeza ku mahoro. Nubwo ibihe biba bikomeye, Imana ikomeza kuba indahemuka. Ntabwo idusaba gusobanukirwa byose mbere; idusaba kuyizera no kuyumvira. Iyo tubikoze, umutima uraruhuka kandi ubuzima bugenda bugira umusaruro.

GUSHYIRA MU BIKORWA UYU MUNSI
1) Tangira umunsi wawe usenga byibura iminota 10, uvuga ku murongo wa Matayo 5:13-16.
2) Andika ibintu bitatu ushimira Imana uyu munsi, nubwo byaba bito.
3) Fata icyemezo kimwe gifatika cyo kubaho mu kuri: kubabarira, kuvugisha ukuri, cyangwa gufasha undi muntu.
4) Nimugoroba, subiza amaso inyuma urebe aho Imana yakuyoboye.

ISENGESHO RISOZA
Mwami Mana, urakoze kuko Ijambo ryawe rinyubaka kandi rikankomeza. Nyigisha kugendera mu kuri kwawe no kuguma mu kwizera nubwo ibihe bitoroshye. Mpa umutima wumva, umenya kubabarira, no gukunda abantu nk uko wabikunze. Umwuka Wera ampindure buri munsi, kugira ngo ubuzima bwanjye bugaragaze Kristo. Mu izina rya Yesu, Amen.

INTAMBWE Y UMWUKA
Urahamagariwe gusoma iri jambo inshuro ebyiri uyu munsi no kurisangiza undi muntu umwe. Ibyo ukoze uyu munsi birashobora gutangira impinduka ndende mu buzima bwawe no mu buzima bw abandi.

title: Enduring to the End

body:
